head.author: tonino102008
head.subject: Resolved CUDA allocation error when attempting multiple IpoptSolve calls with same problem. Compiled and tested with IPOPT_SINGLE option.

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Started working on cuDSS Sparse Solver Interface. Started adding solver options (not finished yet). Will need to modify also the configure and makefile

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Finished writing user modifiable solver options for cuDSS solver.

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Started working on Initialize Structure and creating all the required cuDSS handles, config, data, etc... to actually call the factor/solve functions.

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Finished InitializeImpl and InitializeStructure. Later will have to recheck to be sure that everything is ok. Now trying to play with configure scripts to understand how to link correct libraries and provide necessary header files (CUDA and cuDSS).

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Updated configuration files to compile Ipopt with cuDSS. First try.

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Created cuDSS wrapper library to interface cuDSS with Ipopt. Changed configuration scripts to install.

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Small fix to configure script to have everything working.

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Updated cuDSS interface with necessary functions for Ipopt. Updated IpCuDSS linear solver.

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Fixed bug in cudss matrix update phase. Updated test problem and makefiles to build with cuDSS! Still remains to be solved seg fault in c and with warm restart (maybe trying to reallocate matrix and vector 2 times?)

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Updated interfaces. Still to solve 2nd call to ipopt solver (re-solve) - cudss fails with error CUDSS_STATUS_ALLOC_FAILED (due to pointers being reallocated but not freed before ipopt 2nd restart?).

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Added error checking on cuDSS solver options as explained in https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/cudss/types.html

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Restored test as they were before (no linear_solver option with cuDSS for appveyor tests).

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Added support for IPOPT_SINGLE. Switched all integer types to int64_t to work with cuDSS and avoid ambiguities (some calls need int64_t values for the matrix dimension for example... think it's better to always use int64_t)

patches.author: tonino102008
patches.subject: Resolved CUDA allocation error when attempting multiple IpoptSolve calls with same problem. Compiled and tested with IPOPT_SINGLE option.
